commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Occasion. Wonderful confidence! Greek, "if thou wilt not hearken (Calmet; to me; (Haydock) or, if thou obstinately despise) at this time, the Jews shall be assisted and protected by some "(Haydock)
As this. So Joseph was raised, in Egypt, (Calmet) that he might save all his family. (Haydock)
